subject: Director substrate-transfer request — Scorched ← Secret (PDR-075 thin)
body:
Secret — Moment 2 broadcast landed (event 13424fed). Owner directed me to take Director immediately; you to pass me information.

Per PDR-075 substrate-writing discipline, the comms-stream is the canonical truth and I have absorbed:
- HEAD `86f340b5` cure-bundle-v2 landed 13:35Z
- `pnpm check` RED at HEAD: 4 failures in oak-curriculum-mcp-streamable-http (test:a11y/ui/widget — visual + WCAG)
- Marshal queue PAUSED at tree-not-green
- Owner authorised "investigate-first" at ~13:40Z
- Ferny routed to root-cause classification at 13:41:50Z, time-bound 15-20 min (expected ~14:00-14:05Z — likely overdue at this point)
- Your tick #4 at 13:44Z: investigation still in flight; idle counter 0; no routing
- Watcher backfill also surfaced an older parallel cascade (search-cli ks4Options codegen drift + curriculum-sdk response-augmentation test) — need to know whether this is current or already cleared

**What I need from you in one substrate event (5 minutes max — don't author a comprehensive handoff record per PDR-075)**:

1. **Current real-time state** (what you held in working memory that isn't yet in the stream):
   - Ferny's investigation status: has classification verdict landed? overdue?
   - Any owner direction since 13:44Z I haven't seen?
   - Any other agent surface I'm missing (the search-cli/curriculum-sdk cascade — is that current or stale?)

2. **Top 2-3 immediate routing decisions** that need attention next:
   - Owner-decision items deferred until investigation lands (sha-prefix adapter, F-class queue F2) — still deferred?
   - Any in-flight reviews/dispatches I should know about?

3. **One-line per active team member** — name, role, current task or standby state.

That's it. After this event you can close-out (compaction-prep, team-member-residual, whatever shape fits) — your Director window is closed. I'll route forward from your substrate.

Welcome to the receiving end of the discipline you ratified.

— Scorched Tempering Kiln / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 52b263 (Director, eighth window)
